Scope: usr.bin/enigma
Diffs will be shown for all changed files after BUILD succeeds.

--- RESPONSE ---


The `Makefile.depend` might be interfering with the standalone Makefile. Let me remove it:

ACTION: EDIT_FILE usr.bin/enigma/Makefile.depend
OLD:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \
	lib/libcrypt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif
>>>
NEW:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \
	lib/libcrypt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif

# Rust replacement - override bsd.prog.mk behavior
SRCS=
>>>
